methodology: Local contrast bright target detection (>3x local mean), no ML

findings.temporal_change: Minimal — no significant vehicle movement between dates
findings.bright_targets: Detected clusters are building-scale structures, not vehicle concentrations
findings.resolution_limitation: At 2.5m/px, individual vehicles (25m² ≈ 4 pixels) cannot be reliably distinguished from small structures

conclusion: SAR data consistent with optical analysis — no evidence of military vehicle concentrations at Luga garrison
